programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Frank Blandon, a man with only one good arm, wanders onto the ranch. Lucas gives Blandon a job to "hire him and Mark a clear conscience." General Sheridan and his patrol wander by and Lucas offers to let them stay the night at the ranch. Blandon once pulled a gun on General Sheridan; as it turns out, Blandon was a Confederate soldier who once had General Sheridan in his gun sight during the war.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Sam Jefferson aids Rowdy after his horse takes a spill. Sam is a wanted man and asks Rowdy to turn him in but give the $5,000 reward to his wife.

programme.title: Have Gun, Will Travel
programme.desc: After having killed a bank robber, Paladin is accused of having taken the stolen money. He visits the dead man's widow and tries to make amends.

programme.title: Wanted Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall tracks down a bank-robbing magician and his henchmen, but while in custody of the sheriff, the man and his gang escape. Shot while tracking them down for a second time, Randall must keep the magician and his men at bay to save his own skin.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.sub-title: Vagabond Loafers, Self Made Maids, Hugs And Mugs, He Cooked His Goose, Tricky Dicks, For Crimin' Out Loud
programme.desc: "The Stooges are plumbers who are called out to a fancy mansion where a high society party is being thrown., The Stooges are artists who want to marry their models; "Moella", "Larraine", and "Shempetta". The girls' father doesn't approve, so the Stooges tickle him into submission. , The Stooges are private detectives hired to protect a rich politician. After the man disappears, the boys wander around his spooky mansion confronting various villains and a dangerous dame. The Stooges vanquish the crooks (Shemp uses his "trusty shovel") and find the missing man. , The Stooges run a furniture store and come into possession of a stolen pearl necklace. Three crooked dames convince the boys that the necklace is theirs, and when the real thieves arrive, the Stooges fight to defend the girl's property. The Stooges defeat the bad guys and the girls decide to go honest and return the necklace to its rightful owner. , Larry is a pet dealer who's seeing Moe's wife while at the same time trying to steal Shemp's fiancee. When Moe's become suspicious, Larry attempts to frame Shemp as the boyfriend. He gets Shemp a job as a door-to-door pajama salesman and sends him to Moe's apartment, and then tells both Moe and Shemp's fiancee to go there and catch him in the act. Larry's plan backfires when Shemp catches him and lets Moe deliver some punishment. , The Stooges are policemen on the trail of a murderer. They unsuccessfully interrogate an Italian organ grinder, among other suspects, and then catch the bad guy after a gunfight that nearly destroys the police station. "

programme.title: Svengoolie
programme.desc: "A reporter hunts down a 144-year old alchemist who is killing women for their blood."

programme.title: House of Svengoolie
programme.desc: "A journalist purchases an infamous house to prove its supernatural horrors are fake but discovers the evil may be real."

programme.title: Lost in Space
programme.desc: The Keeper, played by Michael Rennie, is a zookeeper of sorts. He wants to take the children and add them to his collection.

programme.title: Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea
programme.desc: The Seaview loses contact with the world after a fanatic senator hypnotizes the entire crew.

programme.title: Land of the Giants
programme.desc: Diamond thieves take refuge in a wax museum, and Fitzhugh and Barry are caught in the middle.

programme.title: The Time Tunnel
programme.desc: The time travelers find themselves being hunted by Billy the Kid.

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: Vincent is summoned when an alien outpost is discovered at a ski lodge.

programme.title: The Life and Times of Grizzly Adams
programme.desc: "Adams (and Ben) await the arrival of Mad Jack and Nakuma for a great feast. Before they come,an Indian woman shows up, seeking her missing daughter. With a violent storm coming, it's a race against time to find her and have the feast as well."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Bears read signs! They read the signs signaling the beginning of winter – within twenty-four hours of first warning, all bears have disappeared into their caves. We spend this last day with a young grizzly as he prepares for his long nap."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Marlin and his crew sail the waters of the California coast in search of the porpoise of the Pacific."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Marlin and Stan fly into the remote interior of Venezuela to a jutting plateau whose sheer cliff echoes the perpetual thunder of Angel Falls. It is a region so remote that it has often been called the Lost World."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "In South America there are fresh water porpoises living inland in the rivers and streams. During the dry season, as the rivers recede, these porpoises may perish as the water level drops. Marlin and Jim go on an expedition to rescue the trapped llanos porpoises."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Far out in the Pacific Ocean lies a tiny island. Once every year, these barren rocks explode with life as Steller sea lions come ashore by the thousands to breed and give birth to their young. Marlin sails to the island to join a team of scientists to observe and take part in a tagging project."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "In the chill, glacier-fed streams of Alaska sockeye salmon are born, and follow the current to the sea. After two or three great annual circuits of the North Pacific, the call comes to return."

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Each thinking their spouse has a much easier time of it, Mike and Carol switch roles for a day. Carol must help the boys with baseball practice and Mike must help Marcia with a cooking badge.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Jan receives a mysterious locket in the mail. Pretty soon a manhunt begins to find the sender, the only clue being the typewriter used to address the envelope drops its ‘y.’ When the locket mysteriously vanishes, Peter suggests they re-enact exactly what they were doing the night it disappeared.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie, Potsie and Ralph go on a trip to Chicago with the school choir. Not wanting to stay in their hotel room all night, they decide to sneak out and see a show.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne and Shirley believe they are doing a good deed by calling in a building inspector, until Mrs. Babish is given a deadline by which repairs are to be made.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Gomer comes to the courthouse one day with an announcement—he has decided to join the Marines, believing it a test of his manhood.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When a cranky tenant (Elizabeth Patterson in her first appearance as Mrs. Trumble) threatens to move because of Little Ricky's loud crying, Ethel makes it clear that her friendship with Lucy is more important than a rental agreement. But Ethel doesn't let the Ricardos forget her loyalty.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Now that Wally is 17, he feels it's about time that he get his drivers license. However, June and Ward are a bit apprehensive about the idea of Wally driving, but Wally is persistant and finally gets his parents to agree to let him take a drivers class.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver has his heart set on taking a swing at being a paper boy again but another kid beats him to it. This leads Beaver to think about using sabatoge to get the new paper boy fired. However, the boy may just do that himself when the service becomes terrible leading Beaver to confront him only to discover he is a she.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Clampett's swamp is loaded with oil. When a wildcatter discovers the huge pool, Jed sells his land to the O.K. Oil Company and, at the urging of cousin Pearl, moves his family to a 35-room mansion in Beverly Hills, California. But when they get to their new home, which they think is a prison and the gardeners are inmates, they are mistaken for vandals and get arrested.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts finally arrive at their new home, but find there aren't any of the conveniences of their old home. Jethro makes a few new discoveries, things they have never seen before, like pink chickens (flamingoes) and a cement pond. When Miss Jane Hathaway arrives, the executive secretary for Mr. Drysdale, she mistakes the clan for a staff of bumbling, insubordinate backwoods servants.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: An experimental robot launched by the Air Force parachutes onto the island.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: The castaways are frightened as the sounds of battle, including hand grenades and machine guns, rock the island. The culprit turns out to be a gorilla who has found in an old WWII arsenal cave.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.sub-title: A Blast From The Past (s6, ep)
programme.desc: Thelma's high school reputation comes back to haunt her 50 years later.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: After calling in to give advice, Mama gets her own radio show.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A man insists a woman is his reincarnated wife; Julie's hair causes her headaches; a man discovers a secret.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie develops a crush on his teacher, Helen Crump, at the school dance. He spends .74 cents to buy her a gift.

programme.title: Collector's Call
programme.desc: "Lucky Meisenheimer has assembled the world's largest, and most dazzling, yo-yo collection, including a laser yo-yo, an ice-cream-making yo-yo, and a 1950s Mickey Mouse Club yo-yo. Lisa's invited "America's Toy Scout" Joel Mageeto to appraise the collection, and Lucky offers both Lisa and Joel some basic lessons in yo-yo technique."

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye is appointed temporary commander of the 4077th when Colonel Potter rushes off to Tokyo on a mysterious mission. While in command, Hawkeye's main problem is housing a large group of Korean refugees comprised mainly of rambunctious children who need medical care.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Tired of their constant complaints about the quality of recreational activities at the 4077th, Colonel Potter appoints Hawkeye and B.J. as the new morale officers. Winchester's morale has already reached a new peak: He's ecstatic about his operation on a wounded soldier, Sheridan, which saved the boy's leg, leaving only "negligible" side effects—less use of his right hand. However, the soldier was a concert pianist before the war.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie has difficuly keeping his blood pressure down for a company physical after the family launches into a heavy debate over the baby's name.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Gloria suspects hanky-panky when she meets the beautiful blonde Mike's been tutoring after school hours.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie gets a lesson in civil liberties when he's arrested using outlawed tear gas to protect himself against a mugger.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Gloria takes out her frustrations about being pregnant on Mike.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Don Rickles And Mel Torme
programme.desc: "Guests Don Rickles and Mel Torme. Originally aired on 12/07/70."

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Martha Raye And Ross Martin
programme.desc: "Guests Martha Raye and Ross Martin. Originally aired on 11/16/70."

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.sub-title: Oh, How We Met On The Night That We Danced
programme.desc: A pair of Army boots remind Rob and Laura about the first time they met.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.sub-title: Harrison B. Harding Of Camp Crowder, Mo.
programme.desc: Rob thinks that a stranger claiming to be an old Army pal is actually a con-man.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: "Ralph sleeps at the Nortons' to avoid his visiting mother-in-law. "

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An alien crash-lands in a remote mountain village, stirring up fear and animosity among the villagers.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A young couple moves to a new town and discovers that their child seems to be the only one around.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: An alcoholic woman threatens to take her daughter from the guardianship of her foster parents.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Alexander Vanin, arrested and convicted for espionage, hid a list of agents operating in the U.S. His control, Mishenko of the EEPR, has been ordered to get the list but Vanin refuses to give in because then Mishenko would cut him loose.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.sub-title: Last Second Of A Big Dream
programme.desc: Barry Craft figures he'll get some publicity by arranging to have Kimble captured at his wild-animal show.

programme.title: Harry O
programme.desc: "Private investigator Harry Orwell helps the police in their effort to disarm a dangerous bandit barricaded in a liquor store."

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A teenage runaway, intent on becoming a star, has instead wound up in pornographic films. Acting on behalf of the girl's aunt, Friday and Gannon try to find the young "starlet."

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Sgt. Friday is offered a bribe to assist a gypsy family trying to gain control of the gypsy community.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed hope to find an impostor as they investigate a boxing promoter's accusation that a police detective stole $350 from him. In the meantime, they deal with a disgruntled wife who is in the process of destroying her own car in the middle of a downtown street, investigate a gun theft from a pawn shop, drive up on a home burglary in progress and obtain critical information while interrogating a suspected car thief.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy spends a weekend afternoon attending a barbecue at Reed's home, where Reed lets him hold his newborn son for the first time and tries to set him up with his wife's friend. However, their relaxation is interrupted when they have to deal with a young neighbor who overdoses on drugs and becomes the target of his dealer.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill gives Toony a lesson in forgotten fads."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally's new girlfriend, Carolyn, can't go out to the movies on Saturday night because she has to watch her little sister, Susan. Carolyn suggests that Beaver take Susan out to the movies and that they all double date. Not wanting to let Wally down, Beaver decides to go along, despite being nervous.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally and Eddie get jobs at the Mayfield Dairy thanks to Ward pulling some strings. They soon unknowingly find themselves involved in a plot started by the foreman and his assistant, who are secretly stealing the merchandise. When Ward learns of the plot, he warns Wally who in turn tries to warn Eddie, but Eddie doesn't buy it.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Sardonic Sergeant
programme.desc: Major Frank Lessing, a payroll officer on an Army base, is found murdered and Sergeant Joseph Dexter is charged with the crime. The case hinges on a payroll robbery committed in the Philippines years before.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When a gambler is accused of killing his bookie, Matlock agrees to take the case, believing that someone from the bookie's past is the guilty party.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Sparta P.D. gets its first black policewoman.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Jason expresses doubt to the army recruiters that he could ever kill a person.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt pursues a frontiersman who's using force to take homesteaders' land.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When a former actress kills her former boyfriend, Hoss takes the blame and the dead man's senator father vows to have his revenge by taking down the Cartwrights.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Wes Carney and his wife, Clair, want to settle down and they figure North Fork might do fine. Wes is a well known gunfighter, who has promised Clair that he would hang up his guns for good. The Carney's want to live a simple, honest life and the Feed and Grain Store, which is up for sale, seems like it might work for them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Abel Goss, the photographer who took Lucas' wedding photograph, is in North Fork doing a portrait of Mark standing in the street. When Goss sees Col. Whiteside and his sidekick, Jamison, he recognizes them as the butchers who tortured him and others while he was captive in a Civil War prison camp.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Kitty Albright is a registered nurse who's stagecoach is attacked and destroyed. Flint agrees to let her use her new skill on the wagon train. She quickly becomes disturbed at the lack of hygiene and health in general around the train."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A man with a history of heart trouble becomes agitated when his daughter is trapped under a backhoe. A boy shoots himself with a pellet gun. Another paramedic appears on the news and in the paper, making John jealous. A babysitter has an anxiety attack. Gage and DeSoto rescue Brice from a fire.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Irritated that the 4077th is planning a "surprise" party for him, Hawkeye volunteers to go to the aid of a wounded surgeon at the front. An additional irritant to Hawkeye is the arrival of Dr. Borelli, a wisecracking medical advisor with whom he habitually disagrees.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Klinger redecorates his quarters, but the resultant ridicule he receives drives him to new heights in his efforts to get out of the Army. Meanwhile, the doctors are perplexed by the reaction of an Asian-American war hero who tries to kill himself.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The 4077th can't escape the Korean War, even in its dreams. Exhausted after two days without sleep, members of the 4077th steal away for catnaps and experience dreams that reveal their fears, yearnings and frustrations.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: B.J. finds himself attracted to a famous war correspondent, Aggie O'Shea, who has fallen in love with him.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney learns that in order to pass the mandatory physical for the deputy's office, he must weigh more and be taller. Andy and Aunt Bee try to stretch him and fatten him up, until Andy comes up with the solution.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The Taylors quickly realize why they haven't invited Bee's sister and her husband, Ollie, for a visit in more than a decade. When Uncle Ollie borrows Andy's squad car to go fishing, it's the final straw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny misses the seasons, especially the snowy winter. She wants to go home to the hills and see some snow. Jed decides to let Granny win and calls Drysdale to tell him that Granny wants to head back home to the hills. He learns that she wants the snow back. Drysdale comes up with a plan to keep the hillbillies in Beverly Hills, telling them that a big blizzard is going to strike Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer is pleased when asked to be one of three busboys for a visiting colonel. But his attention is turned to the officer's sad little daughter, who is lonely and needs a playmate.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan uses a broken water main under the camp to aid the escape of captured resistance fighters by creating a health spa.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: A Klink, A Bomb And A Short Fuse
programme.desc: General Burkhalter wants Hogan to defuse a bomb that has landed in camp.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Debbie Reynolds And John Davidson
programme.desc: "Guests Debbie Reynolds and John Davidson. Originally aired on 11/30/70."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Reckless Rockhound
programme.desc: When a businessman responsible for decimating a local mining business returns to town, it is not long before he is found murdered.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A ventriloquist is convinced that his dummy is not only alive but also evil.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A practical joke has a devastating effect on an adulterous spouse.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Housewives being blackmailed by a plumber exact their revenge.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: The daughter of an ex-convict is the leading suspect in murders involving unrecovered loot from one of her father's robberies.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "Cannon receives a confession from a dying hitman who says he was responsible for the murder of his wife and daughter 14 years ago."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Betty's friend dies of an alleged heart attack during his constitutional.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: When a nine-month old child is beaten, Friday and Gannon investigate the parents, who are more concerned about their failing relationship than their baby son.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An ex-con accused of extortion is interrogated. He calmly and smugly insists that he is innocent, but Friday and Gannon have a surprise for him: taped conversations and a voice analysis device.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed are rendered powerless when a drunken man with no flight experience decides to take a solo flight in a stolen airplane at a busy airport. Later, they try to locate a 17-year-old runaway living in a condemned home with a much older man, engage in a shootout with a convenience store robber and search for a booby-trapped bank safe that has been stolen with a tow truck.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy fears that a boxer who has just been paroled after serving a murder sentence is going to seek revenge against him. Out on patrol, they try to save a man who has been crushed while working under a stolen car, apprehend a liquor store robber who swears revenge against reed, change a flat tire on their patrol car, locate a four-year-old child who locked himself in a refrigerator and become the targets of an ambush.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony solve a cartoon mystery as part of Mr. Quizzer's newest game show "Catch the Connection!""

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: After coming home late on a school night, Ward and June punish Beaver by not allowing him to go anywhere on school nights. Beaver feels the punishment is unfair, so Eddie suggests Beaver write to an advice column.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: "The news that Eddie has moved out of his parent's house and into an apartment of his own has June worried that Wally may be contemplating something similar. However, Wally gets a picture of just how "happy" Eddie is being on his own and it makes him think twice."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Curious Bride
programme.desc: Rhoda Reynolds is charged with murdering her blackmailing ex-husband, Arthur Kane. At the trial, Mason moves the proceedings to the room in which Kane was murdered in order to re-enact the fatal night.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When a gambler is accused of killing his bookie, Matlock agrees to take the case, believing that someone from the bookie's past is the guilty party.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Someone is selling crack to teenagers and Sweet tries desperately to save a young addict.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John-Boy asks his family to help Mike Paxton, a friend who was recently handicapped

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt comes to the rescue when a father and son abuse the mother and daughter.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When the Doyle gang escapes while being transferred to a prison in Virginia City, they take Jamie and three others hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Aaron Pelser's wagon train comes across a pair of young boys on a buck board heading west, so he invites them to join the train. When he finds out that one of the boys is actually a girl and the two claim to be headed to Yuma to get married, Pelser and his crowd force them to be married in North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: McCain befriends Donnel O'Mahoney, a tough kid from Brooklyn, and arranges with two men for the young man to continue his travels on their wagon. Things go wrong, however, when one of them is murdered, and the other accuses the boy.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Maud Frazer takes command of her wagon train after all the men are killed. Flint tries to dissuade Maud from going through hostile Indian country where there is gold.. She proceeds anyway but is forced to change plans."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: "A careless worker sparks an explosive fire in a high-rise building. Station 110 leads a full alarm response, assisted by Squad 51. A triage team from Rampart Hospital, led by Dr. Brackett, sets up in a nearby garage. Several workmen and two women including the fiancee of a paramedic remain trapped on the 16th floor. A Coast Guard helicopter assists in rooftop evacuation; Dixie and Dr. Early take charge of the many patients at Rampart. A paramedic is injured attempting a rescue, while Gage and DeSoto extricate themselves from a broken elevator. An explosion on the 21st floor injures a fire captain, necessitating a dangerous rescue down an elevator shaft."

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Angered by the way civilian doctors in the States are profiting from the war, Hawkeye presents the Army with a bill for his medical services. Meanwhile, Charles reluctantly demonstrates American medical practices to three Korean medics, and is on the receiving end of their medical expertise.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A no-nonsense Colonel, who is notorious as a hard-nosed disciplinarian, visits the 4077th during an outbreak of April Fools' Day pranksterism. Colonel Potter tries in vain to halt the mayhem before Colonel Tucker arrives in camp.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: On his way to some R&R in Tokyo, a North Korean soldier forces Hawkeye to perform an emergency roadside operation on his buddy.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Members of the 4077th share their impressions of war in response to letters from fourth graders in Hawkeye's hometown. Margaret writes about how there are some patients she will never forget, while the Colonel tells of his days as "Hoops."

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.sub-title: The Education Of Ernest T. Bass
programme.desc: Ernest T. is back in Mayberry to get his diploma. He is so determined that Andy convinces Helen to allow him to attend class, but Ernest T. isn't exactly classroom material.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: An old beau of Aunt Bee comes to town to court her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro decides to give up his dream of becoming a brain surgeon to try his luck at the spy business. Meanwhile, The Banker’s Convention is going on, including the beauty contest for Most Beautiful Bank Employee, and Drysdale could lose because of Mr. Cushing’s contestant.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: "Carter becomes the star of a documentary about the Marine Corps."

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan is ordered to photograph and destroy a model for a radio-controlled tank that is being tested at camp.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: Will The Real Adolf Please Stand Up?
programme.desc: With camp security raised, Hogan and his men are desperate to smuggle top-secret German fortifications information to the Allies. The solution? Make liberal use of Carter's remarkable impersonation of Adolf Hitler.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, And Julie Bond
programme.desc: "Guests Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, and Julie Bond. Originally aired on 12/14/70."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Latent Lover
programme.desc: A man left unhinged by his wife's affair has been acting out in very strange ways, even attempting to rob a bank in his despair. And when his wife ends up murdered, he is the natural suspect.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a newlywed couple visit the groom's childhood home, the ties of the past prove too strong to resist.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Immature Elliott Gray challenges a much older gentleman for the hand of Enid Patterson.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: After spending six years in prison for a robbery he didn't commit, a man decides to get even.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: When Mannix is hired to investigate a case of blackmail, the blackmailer turns up dead.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "Frank Cannon and Barnaby Jones team up for an investigation of a murder at a big corporation in which a deliveryman was charged with the crime."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A black cab driver runs from a murder scene on the grounds that circumstantial evidence - and racism - would make him the prime suspect.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon learn that a young man has called his mother from Hollywood "to say goodbye." With the help of the man's sister, the two detectives trace the impending suicide to a hotel with more than 1,200 rooms.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Petty theft from drug and hardware stores leads to a group of four teens who are determined to start their own nation on a remote island off the California coast.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed search for a suspect who frames an employee of a manufacturing plant for theft and then plants a powerful bomb on the premises. They also apprehend two criminals after questioning a suspicious man who is carrying heavy bags down the street, and protect an innocent motorist from a street race that still ends in tragedy.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed spend a night shift on desk duty after Malloy breaks his wrist and another office worker calls in sick. With the assistance of a new female recruit, they deal with a homesick elderly woman who refuses to identify herself, help a lenient father bail out his son and become suspicious of a man who walks in looking for a wanted fugitive.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony visit true American festivals dedicated to fire ants, werewolves, wooly worms and more!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: "Beaver wants to join a record club and asks Ward for the money to join. Fed up with Beaver constantly asking for money, Ward decides to put him on an allowance. However, Beaver is so thrilled with his records he disreguards the bills for them and quickly finds himself swamped with records, a rising bill and not enough allowance to pay for everything."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: June and Ward go away for the weekend and Wally asks to borrow Ward's new car to go to a dance. Although hesitant, Ward finally gives in and lets him take it. However, after the dance, Lumpy runs into some car trouble which results in Wally smashing the headlight on the car. Wally is now faced with having it repaired and paying for it himself and trying to find a way to break it gently to Ward.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Buried Clock
programme.desc: Slimy Jack Hardisty embezzles $100,000 from his father-in-law, Dr. Blane. The greedy Hardisty then tries to blackmail the doctor for more. Mason is hired by Dr. Blane to put an end to Hardisty's machinations but before he can swing into action Hardisty is found dead.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock meets Conrad's new girlfriend, Carla Royce. When Carla's boss is murdered and she is suspected, Matlock defends her against the charge.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: After a private investigator searching for a missing child is found dead, the evidence points to a local dance teacher - a neighbor that Parker has become very fond of.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Olivia is always tired these days. When a rest does not help, she sees a doctor and learns what is wrong

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: When his uncle comes to visit, Chester's plan to shorten his stay doesn't exactly work out.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The peace of the Ponderosa is disrupted when a gambler arrives for a stay after losing all his money in a stock scheme.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart arrives in North Fork in search of renegade indians suspected of the brutal killing of a Texas Ranger and his family. The townspeople are suspicious of him, however, when they discover that he, too, is an indian.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Reformed card shark Julia Massini now runs a respectable boarding house in North Fork, but Sid Fallon is threatening to reveal her sordid past unless she lets him turn the establishment into a saloon and gambling hall.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Selena Hartnell joins the train after bandits attack her wagon. Later, she reveals she is a bounty hunter looking for William Barrett, a murderer on the run. It turns out that Barrett is Will Cottrell, the leader of pacifists on the train."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: "A careless worker sparks an explosive fire in a high-rise building. Station 110 leads a full alarm response, assisted by Squad 51. A triage team from Rampart Hospital, led by Dr. Brackett, sets up in a nearby garage. Several workmen and two women including the fiancee of a paramedic remain trapped on the 16th floor. A Coast Guard helicopter assists in rooftop evacuation; Dixie and Dr. Early take charge of the many patients at Rampart. A paramedic is injured attempting a rescue, while Gage and DeSoto extricate themselves from a broken elevator. An explosion on the 21st floor injures a fire captain, necessitating a dangerous rescue down an elevator shaft."

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A jilted Italian soldier, Corpsman Ignazio De Simone, is smitten by Margaret; Klinger pours a cement floor in the operating room to fight the spread of germs.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Margaret has trouble pretending she's a chip off the old block when her dad, blood and guts "Howitzer" Al Houlihan, arrives for a visit. Also, Hawkeye fixes up a soldier who repays them with a large side of steak, but the general who it belongs to is really steamed.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Klinger is so depressed by news that his ex-wife plans to remarry, he reenlists for an additional six-year stretch. Meanwhile, a male nurse has a gripe against the Army.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Winchester takes command during Potter's absence; and B.J. and Hawkeye try to convince the Marines to grant a hardship discharge to an immigrant soldier, Private Jost Van Liter.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney's attempts to train an old mutt named Blue as a police dog coincide with a manhunt for an escaped criminal.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney and Thelma Lou have an argument. They reconcile quickly, but it leads to other arguments between Andy and Barney, Thelma Lou and Helen, Andy and Helen, and another between Barney and Thelma Lou.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: It is the day after Granny beat up the Boston Strong Girl, making her the new champ, and the Clampetts are celebrating Granny’s great victory. But not all is well. The woman who plays the Boston Strong Girl is in trouble for getting beat up. The woman who plays Rebecca of Donnybrook Farm, a former topless waitress, has learned the truth, getting an invitation from Granny to visit. Their manager, Gene Booth, sees this as an opportunity to get Granny to fight, after hearing the huge ratings the fight got.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer tries to repay the $40 he received at a pay phone to the phone company, but gets arrested instead.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Carter convinces the German he is one of them when he is captured in German uniform.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan tries to save Klink from an officer who plans on turning him in for not having balanced books.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Jerry Lewis And Leslie Uggams
programme.desc: "Guests Jerry Lewis and Leslie Uggams. Originally aired on 01/11/71."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Wooden Nickels
programme.desc: Mason becomes embroiled in a case involving coin collectors, counterfeit coins, fraud—and murder.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A widower buys a robotic grandmother for his three children.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: After a man turns to prayer, he starts to win at the races.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: In prison for jaywalking, a salesman finds himself locked in a cell with an accused murderer.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.sub-title: The Girl In The Polka Dot Dress
programme.desc: Mannix scoffs at a psychic's tale about a woman in danger. Then the prophecy comes true.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "Cannon investigates a doctors claim that he is innocent of a death he was charged with concerning a patient he was treating that had slipped into a diabetic coma. Cannon becomes involved in a medical malpractice suit when a young resident physician is charged with making the wrong diagnosis on a woman in an apparent diabetic coma who dies after his treatment. Hired by the hospital facing a two million dollar suit, Cannon hears testimony of the accused Dr. Jeff Reston, played by guest star David Birney, that the woman he treated wore a diabetic's bracelet. She was, in fact, suffering from hypoglycemia. But the bracelet disappeared and none of the nurses attending with Reston can back up his story. Reston then gives Cannon a motive for a possible conspiracy against him. "

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby looks for a millionaire's mistress, unaware that she's stolen a priceless objet d'art.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are screening applicants for the Police Academy. One seems to have all the right qualifications, except that six months are missing from his application.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: More than $100,000 has been embezzled from an industrial company. An investigation of the employees leads Friday and Gannon to a habitual gambler.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed witness a young hispanic man save a trapped watchman from a burning warehouse, but become suspicious when he resists numerous attempts of private and public commendation. They also try to prevent a drunken man from falling out a window, and resuscitate a man with a heart condition.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed has to deal with the consequences of forgetting to roll up the window on the patrol car before he left it. Back on patrol, Malloy and Reed search for an estranged husband who kidnaps his own child, deal with an elderly man who tries to pay for a meal with trading stamps, engage in a shootout with an escaped prisoner caught napping on a city bus and pull over a hijacked delivery van full of booze.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony reminisce on the year 1982."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: At school, Beaver gets into an argument with a girl who retaliates by making fun of Beaver's hair, calling him a sheepdog. Incredibly self-concious, Beaver goes out to the store and buys different hairsprays and gels to try to improve his hairdo. He doesn't get the reaction he was expecting when he tries his new hairdo out on his family.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: During one of his football team's games, Beaver is sent in and scores the winning touchdown, which results in a picture in the paper. Soon, Beaver finds himself swamped with attention and quickly lets it goes to his head. He begins acting like he's better than everyone and begins to alienate Gilbert, Whitey and Wally.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Married Moonlighter
programme.desc: A moonlighting school teacher is charged with the murder of an acquaintance he had taken home after the man had earlier raised a disturbance at his night job at a cafe.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: After a well-known actor with a bad reputation is murdered, Matlock is asked by a judge friend to defend his son, who had recently lost his job as bodyguard for the deceased.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: An outlaw family seeks revenge against Bubba after he is forced to shoot one of them during a holdup. The chief wants him to stay out of sight until they are arrested - a suggestion that does not set well with Bubba.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: While Jim-Bob is working underneath a car, it falls and Jim-Bob has a close call with death

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A gambler makes a bet that a man who's never used a gun can pass as a gunslinger.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Jamie's grandfather comes to claim him just as Ben is arranging for his adoption.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas puts his life in jeopardy when he agrees to testify in a murder case involving a witness killed before he could testify and a killer still at large.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaw Sam Morley falls in love with a young woman who has a serious illness. He asks Lucas to turn him in for the reward and then use the money to pay for her medical care.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Clementine Jones is in the process of being thrown out of a town when a bank robbery occurs. She ends up joining the Hale wagon train on a wagon with one of the bank robbers using it to escape who she was in love with in the past."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: "Squad 51 C-shift paramedics rescue a stuntman from a tower. Gage and Desoto respond to treat the injured child of a fireman’s widow. A small plane and a chartered jetliner collide in midair, landing in a residential neighborhood, trapping Johnny and Roy. Station 18 leads a massive response from Battalion 14 and the Compton city fire department. Dr. Morton heads up a triage team from Rampart. Multiple rescues include passengers from both planes and people in the subdivision. Dr. Early performs brain surgery on the injured child. An elderly man’s dog leads Chief McConnike to its owner."

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye uses a bottle of vintage wine to lure unsuspecting nurses into his den; and Potter tries to secure a different sort of anesthetic when the army threatens to ban a painkiller.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Klinger saves Winchester's life when an explosion rocks the operating room; and B.J. is reluctant to reveal the extent of his injuries after the blast.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Margaret develops a case of prickly heat, Charles does his tax returns and Klinger takes the P.A. apart—just some of the events that occur during another unendurably hot night at the 4077th.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Klinger's army newspaper reports on Hawkeye's monument to military stupidity; a giant tower made from a half million erroneously shipped tongue depressors.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Fred the grocery store clerk repeatedly sweeps trash into the street, even after Barney writes him a citation. Fred threatens that if he ever sees Barney out of uniform, he'll pound him, causing Barney to leave his uniform on at all times.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie finds a lost wallet containing $50, and just as he's waited the seven-day period to claim the money as his own, the owner steps forward.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny has heard that Miss Jane has never been proposed to and wants to help out. She tries to get Jed to propose, but has no luck with that plan. Granny then settles to have Jethro propose to her. Jethro asks Miss Jane out, and she accepts. While at the bank, Jethro also meets the gorgeous new night guard, Ilse.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: In search of a "real person" for his Foster Furniture Polish ad campaign, Mr. Foster thinks Aunt Bee has what it takes to make his television commercials memorable.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Klink fails a physical and gets combat duty at the Russian front.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan plans to detour the German bombers that normally attack London to a nearby Allied airbase.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Mel Torme And Michele Lee
programme.desc: "Guests Mel Torme and Michele Lee. Originally aired on 01/18/71."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Blonde Bonanza
programme.desc: When a shady promoter is killed after a crooked modeling deal, his intended victim is suspected of his murder—but the truth in this case is more than skin deep.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An angel trying to earn his wings comes to the aide of a down-on-her-luck woman who has just been fired.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: After falling in love with his invalid wife's nurse, a man schemes to get rid of his wife altogether.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A museum piece causes problems for a curious visitor.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix ruffles some feathers in a small town when he arrives in search of a missing youth.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "Cannon reopens an investigation when he discovers a convicted man may be innocent, but then refuses parole. Robert Foxworth is the villain. He plays a murderer, an ex-Green Beret who served in Vietnam with overtones of CIA activity. The murdered man was Cannon's friend, and that brings him into the case. When the convicted murderer turns down a parole, Cannon becomes very curious."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Thugs steal a photographer's negatives and blind her after she does an assignment at an air-freight terminal.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are on a mission to bolster community relations when a young and slightly militant black man barricades himself in his apartment rather than submit to a traffic warrant.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon appear on a TV panel. The topic: "The Police—Who Needs Them?"

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed are in for a rude awakening when they report to the home of a former professional wrestler on a domestic abuse call. Later, they become suspicious of an apartment burglary victim after they find one of the suspects dead, deal with a man who discovers car parts that were stolen from him installed on another car and become involved in a shootout responding to a bank robbery.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman openly offers malloy and reed security jobs at three times their current salaries if reed agrees to withhold damaging testimony against his troubled son. In the meantime, they have to deal with an elderly man who has strangled his ch

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony explore the hawkeye state!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver has been given an assignment in which he must write a autobiography for class but isn't sure about his abilities at writing. So, he convinces a girl, who likes him, to write it for him. When she discovers that he is merely using her, she writes an outrageous life story and hands it in, causing embarrassment for Beaver when the teacher reads it in class.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally asks June and Ward if he could have a party and with some prodding, Wally finally gets their permission. June quickly begins the plans and Beaver gets a look at the guest list and quickly finds that he's not invited. For revenge, Beaver decides to sabotage Wally's party with a variety of gags that he bought at a magic shop.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Jilted Jockey
programme.desc: Jockey Tic Barton is in a mess of trouble. First, he's fired when his horse loses a fixed race and then he's charged with murder after confronting Johnny Starr, the man actually responsible for the fix. And, oh yes, Tic's wife was having an affair.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When stockbroker Richard Wagner is murdered, his former partner, Avery Campbell, needs Julie's help to prove his innocence.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A young refugee claims to be the son of a Sparta cop who died in the war. But quickly becomes a suspect in a murder/robbery after he accepts a ride with the criminals who actually committed the crime. Gillespie looks into his story, while Virgil and the boys track down the shooter. Meanwhile, the young man’s presence triggers a surprisingly bitter reaction from Parker, who views him as a painful reminder of the war.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Ben has a new camera and takes pictures of Erin that becomes a pin-up

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A fall guy learns that his father, a general, is dying.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: After his horse breaks a leg, Joe is left stranded and exhausted in the desert—finding himself at the mercy of a tribe of Indians who discover him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas welcomes his old friend, Tom Birch, who once saved his life, unaware that the man is now a bank robber who is on the run with his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Dan Maury, released from Yuma prison, arrives in North Fork intent on getting even with Marshal Torrance, who helped send him to jail.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Jenna Douglas is found by scouts for the wagon train. She appears to have been a victim of a scavenger attack and is adopted by the train. As time goes on people on the train begin to have doubts about her story and her mental state."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: "Squad 51 C-shift paramedics rescue a stuntman from a tower. Gage and Desoto respond to treat the injured child of a fireman’s widow. A small plane and a chartered jetliner collide in midair, landing in a residential neighborhood, trapping Johnny and Roy. Station 18 leads a massive response from Battalion 14 and the Compton city fire department. Dr. Morton heads up a triage team from Rampart. Multiple rescues include passengers from both planes and people in the subdivision. Dr. Early performs brain surgery on the injured child. An elderly man’s dog leads Chief McConnike to its owner."

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye wagers that he can go a full day without a wisecrack, and Winchester finally confronts the major who exiled him to the 4077th.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Winchester is sent to inspect sanitary conditions on the frontlines, while the rest of the camp plans a surprise anniversary party for B.J.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: One of Margaret's nurses tries to hide her severe drinking problem, and Hawkeye is scorned after a practical joke he plays on Winchester backfires.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Colonel Potter nearly blows his stack when his well-intentioned colleagues mollycoddle him in order to lower his blood pressure.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy considers moving to Raleigh for another job. An upset Barney tries to demonstrate to Andy just how bad Mayberry would be without him, creating more harm than good in his effort to get Andy to stay.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee gets the lead role in the Centennial Pageant as Lady Mayberry. She is, however, not up to the challenge, and Andy must find a way to tell her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is still working on being a 007 spy, though it is annoying Granny. And Elly has been crowned Queen of the Bankers Ball. Mr. Cushing is not happy about this though, as he wanted his contestant to win. Because Jethro is having more fun at Cushing’s bank, he tries to get Jed to transfer his money to the Merchant’s Bank. And Cushing sees this opportunity and tries to get that gorgeous Clampett account.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer wins a vacation for two to Las Vegas and Sgt. Carter joins him. Gomer doesn't want to gamble as much as he wants to see the sights, but the sergeant is committed to gaming.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: After detecting an information leak in the area of Stalag 13, the Germans replace Klink with a more efficient officer, who Hogan sets up to take the fall.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan tries to keep a French painting from ending up in Goering's art collection.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Rita Haryworth And Jim Bailey
programme.desc: "Guests Rita Haryworth and Jim Bailey. Originally aired on 02/01/71."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Ruinous Road
programme.desc: When a land development deal goes sour, Mason defends engineer Adam Conrad, accused of a murder committed in an old house that has something sinister hidden underneath it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An elderly private school teacher wonders if his life has meant anything as he contemplates suicide on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: An older woman tries to convince her young lover to end her husband's life.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: When the syndicate turns against the owner of a casino, he fears for his life.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Forced to crash land a plane, Mannix gets rescued by an escaped convict who's being pursued by corrupt law enforcement officers out to silence him.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Reporter Molly Stoner needs the help of her friend Frank Cannon. The police wants to take her in coercive detention. Molly affirms that infamous gangster Benje Canto has been murdered. Yet her source cannot be revealed.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.sub-title: Murder In The Key Of C
programme.desc: Barnaby is hired to find a composer's fiancé who disappeared running away from unscrupulous music publishers.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.sub-title: Who's Afraid Of The Big Bad Jinx?
programme.desc: Lately it seems Uncle Joe can't do anything right, so everyone avoids him.
